name: Grade 2 Mathematics — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 2 pathway for fractions, geometry, time, money, and multi-step problem solving. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 2 knowledge and transferable skills in fractions, geometry, time, money, and multi-step problem solving.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: fractions, geometry, time, money, and multi-step problem solving
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about fractions, geometry, time, money, and multi-step problem solving and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
